curriculum_context.concept: Log-structured storage with partitioned ordered offsets, consumer-group cursors, lag, replay, retention
curriculum_context.mechanic: Log Pier (3D partition lanes + offset slots + cursor rings + retention tide)
curriculum_context.accepted_signal: key-colored orb routed to matching lane, appended at nextOffset, cursor fetched-then-committed, lag held under tolerance
curriculum_context.rejected_trap: misroute to wrong lane, skip commit (at-least-once redelivery), cursor left behind the retention tide
